2605.01418.title: TimeTok: Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation via Hierarchical Tokenization
2605.01418.paper_summary: Time-series generative models often lack control over temporal granularity, forcing users to accept whatever granularity the model produces. To enable truly user-driven generation, we introduce TimeTok, a unified framework for Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation (GC-TSG), which generates time series at any target granularity from any coarser input (e.g., rough sketches) or from scratch. At the core of TimeTok is a hierarchical tokenization strategy that maps time series into an ordered sequence of tokens, from coarse to fine temporal granularity. Our autoregressive generation process operates across these granularity levels, producing token blocks that are decoded back into continuous time series. This design naturally enables GC-TSG - including standard generation - within a single framework, where controlling the number of token blocks provides explicit control over output detail. Experiments show that TimeTok excels at GC-TSG tasks while achieving state-of-the-art performance in standard generation. Furthermore, we showcase TimeTok's potential as a foundational tokenizer by training on multiple datasets with heterogeneous temporal granularities, verifying strong transferability that consistently outperforms models trained on individual datasets. To our knowledge, this is the first unified framework that covers the full generative spectrum for time series, offering a valuable foundation for models that benefit from diverse temporal granularities.
2605.01418.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列生成模型通常缺乏對時間粒度的控制，迫使使用者接受模型所產生的任何粒度。為了實現真正以使用者為驅動的生成，我們引入了 TimeTok，一個統一的框架，用於粒度可控的時間序列生成（GC-TSG），它可以從任何粗略的輸入（例如粗略草圖）或從零開始生成任意目標粒度的時間序列。TimeTok 的核心是一種層次化的標記策略，將時間序列映射為一個有序的標記序列，從粗到細的時間粒度。我們的自回歸生成過程在這些粒度層級上運作，生成的標記塊被解碼回連續的時間序列。這一設計自然地在單一框架內實現了 GC-TSG，包括標準生成，其中控制標記塊的數量提供了對輸出細節的明確控制。實驗顯示，TimeTok 在 GC-TSG 任務中表現優異，同時在標準生成中達到了最先進的性能。此外，我們展示了 TimeTok 作為基礎標記器的潛力，通過在多個具有異質時間粒度的數據集上進行訓練，驗證了其強大的可轉移性，並始終超越在單一數據集上訓練的模型。據我們所知，這是第一個涵蓋時間序列生成全範圍的統一框架，為受益於多樣時間粒度的模型提供了有價值的基礎。
2605.01418.author: Seokhyun Lee et.al.
2605.01418.authors: Seokhyun Lee, Jaeho Kim, Changjun Oh, Mihaela van der Schaar, Changhee Lee
